picks.rationale: VLO surged +31% in the past month and +89% YTD, driven by soaring refining margins amid the Strait of Hormuz blockade. P/E 22.6, yield 1.55%, with buy consensus.
MPC's +91% YTD and +28.7% 1-month gains reflect the refinery margin expansion from the Iran conflict. P/E 20.6, yield 1.25%, with buy rating.
SHEL offers a low P/E of 13.6 and a 3.58% yield, with +10.8% 1-month momentum as oil prices rally on war news. Strong buy consensus.
CVX has the best analyst consensus (score 1.71) and a 3.8% dividend yield, with +7.9% 1-month momentum on rising oil prices. P/E 32.7.
EOG boasts a low P/E of 13.76 and the highest news sentiment (0.316) among peers, with +33.7% YTD and +8.4% 1-month. Buy recommendation.
XOM's +21.8% YTD and +6.9% 1-month gains are supported by its integrated model and low beta of 0.16. P/E 24.8, yield 2.8%.
COP has a strong analyst score of 1.76 and a P/E of 19.4, with +6.5% 1-month momentum. Dividend yield 2.93%.
BP offers the highest dividend yield at 4.77% and low short interest of 0.47%, with +7.2% 1-month gain. P/E 33.8, hold consensus.
EQNR has surged +55.8% YTD and +15.4% in the last month, with a low P/E of 16.9 and yield 4.07%. However, analyst hold (score 3.33) tempers conviction.
OXY's +30.7% YTD and +5.9% 1-month gains are notable, but its P/E of 74.1 is elevated. Yield 1.9%, buy consensus, low short interest of 0.02%.
